raw_consumer_statement:
I have attempted to escalate this issue over and over to AMEX 's team but now I unfortunately must take this here. Back on XX/XX/scrub> 2024, I ordered a device from XXXX XXXX so I can plug-in my mobile sims from home and use my number on my computer and not my phone. 

Since then, it has been a mess. First of all, I have not gotten my item from the merchant nor have I been issued any sort of refund from XXXX XXXX nor the merchant. XXXX XXXX is known to support their XXXX merchant 's over foreign customers. So, I took it to AMEX. I cited how I have not received my items. I showed them XXXX XXXX 's promises to fully refund customers for items that have not been received under their XXXX XXXX XXXX. I have shown AMEX screenshot messages, yes, messages from the merchant telling me they would refund me in the event that my I do not get my items. Furthermore, I have even provided reason to believe that the merchant did not ship out the correct items, which is why the shipment never made it to my destination. So on and so on. I have given them everything. I have provided multiple paper statements and screenshots of it all. 

I have even cited AMEX 's policy on their disputes, which they do not seem to withhold at all. Reason code XXXX here : https : //www.americanexpress.com/content/dam/amex/au/en/merchant/static/chargebackcodeguide.pdf AMEX has been unhelpful and unwilling to help out their customers who have been scammed out of their money, even though I provided all of the evidence, and the merchant only provided close to nothing. I have tried reasoning and reopening the dispute but to no avail. So, now I am here, I plan on continuing to fight and take this public. Please stay tuned for updates.
